# Kyle Wu

Kyle Wu is a fintech builder focused on trading workflow automation, market microstructure research, execution quality, and AI-native product-building.

Primary site:
https://kylewu.me

Selected projects:
- Kaiyn Trading Bot: https://kylewu.me/projects/kaiyn-trading-bot
